text:
In this chapter:

(1) a reference to an offense under Section 49.04 (Driving While Intoxicated) , Penal Code, includes an offense under Article 6701l-1, Revised Statutes, as that law existed immediately before September 1, 1994;

(2) a reference to an offense under Section 49.07 (Intoxication Assault) , Penal Code:

(A) means only an offense under that section involving the operation of a motor vehicle; and

(B) includes an offense under Section 6701l-1, Revised Statutes, as that law existed immediately before September 1, 1994; and

(3) a reference to an offense under Section 49.08 (Intoxication Manslaughter) , Penal Code:

(A) means only an offense under that section involving the operation of a motor vehicle; and

(B) includes an offense under Section 19.05 (Criminally Negligent Homicide) (a)(2), Penal Code, as that law existed immediately before September 1, 1994.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.004 — Penal Code References

In this chapter:

    (1) a reference to an offense under Section 49.04 (Driving While Intoxicated) , Penal Code, includes an offense under Article 6701l-1, Revised Statutes, as that law existed immediately before September 1, 1994;

    (2) a reference to an offense under Section 49.07 (Intoxication Assault) , Penal Code:

        (A) means only an offense under that section involving the operation of a motor vehicle; and

        (B) includes an offense under Section 6701l-1, Revised Statutes, as that law existed immediately before September 1, 1994; and

    (3) a reference to an offense under Section 49.08 (Intoxication Manslaughter) , Penal Code:

        (A) means only an offense under that section involving the operation of a motor vehicle; and

        (B) includes an offense under Section 19.05 (Criminally Negligent Homicide) (a)(2), Penal Code, as that law existed immediately before September 1, 1994.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
